title: [kimi-review] 29abf80: [SEVERITY: medium] The diff contains no code changes — the c
description:
Commit: 29abf801b
Message: fix(schc): add mo_arg validation in _check_msb

Finding: [SEVERITY: medium] The diff contains no code changes — the commit is empty despite the message claiming to add `mo_arg` validation in `_check_msb`. Either the actual change was omitted from the diff or this is a no-op commit that doesn't implement the stated fix. Cannot verify correctness of validation logic that isn't present; the commit should be amended to include the change or dropped.
close_reason: Added consistent mo_arg > length_bits validation in Python context.rule_matches, updated _check_msb to use SchcError uniformly, and mirrored the check in Rust rule_matches to prevent invalid shifts; tests pass
